claim: metrics.json is dashboard-ready with 12+ fields including summary, by_status, by_severity, by_category, alerts, and health
MASTER_DEBT.jsonl has 8,472 records as of 2026-03-27 with a 13% resolution rate

hook-runs.jsonl has 120 records covering pre-commit (14 checks) and pre-push (12 checks) with no shared check IDs between the two sets

retros.jsonl has 57 records but 17 are stubs with null top_wins/top_misses/process_changes — 30% data completeness gap
reviews-archive.jsonl has 478 records but fixed/deferred/total counts are 0 in most — archive is usable for pattern frequency analysis only, not numeric count trends
All 8 ecosystem audit skills produce persistent history files at .claude/state/*-ecosystem-audit-history.jsonl with per-run grades, scores, and category breakdowns

lifecycle-scores.jsonl has 20 records with capture/storage/recall/action scores per data system; action dimension peaks at 2 (not 3) in current data
enforcement-manifest.jsonl has 360 records showing 17% automated gate coverage vs 82% manual-only for pattern enforcement
override-log.jsonl canonical path is .claude/override-log.jsonl (NOT .claude/state/override-log.jsonl)
resolve-dependencies.js --json flag exists and works today, returning ready/blocked/completed arrays with 81 ready, 12 blocked, 10 completed tasks
next.config.mjs uses output: 'export' making the app a static SPA — API routes work in dev mode only and are absent from production builds
Hybrid fetch strategy: dev mode uses /api/<tab>/data routes reading live JSONL files; production uses public/<tab>-data.json static snapshots built by prebuild script
No app/api/ directory exists — all API routes for the dashboard must be created from scratch
Recharts, @tanstack/react-table, @tanstack/react-virtual, and minisearch are not installed and must be added before dashboard development
Recharts 3.x fully supports React 19 as a peer dependency with no overrides required — install via npx shadcn@latest add chart
Current DevTabId union is 'lighthouse' | 'errors' | 'sessions' | 'docs' | 'overrides' — all 5 must be replaced with 6 new tabs
6-tab structure confirmed: Tab1=Health & Alerts, Tab2=Debt Pipeline, Tab3=Code Review Quality, Tab4=Build Pipeline & Process Compliance, Tab5=Governance & Audits, Tab6=Planning & Research
Dashboard header should have a Watch Items widget fed by forward-findings.jsonl (4 records of cross-PR forward-looking issues)
Admin panel (/admin) is light-themed, Firebase-backend, audience=app-operator; Dev dashboard (/dev) is dark-themed, local-file-backend, audience=developer — clean split with no data overlap
lighthouse-tab.tsx is the de facto UX reference implementation for all new dev tabs — dark theme tokens, isCancelled cleanup pattern, loading/error/empty states established there
BUG-01: debt-health.js uses lowercase status strings ('resolved') but MASTER_DEBT canonical values are uppercase ('RESOLVED') — status filters will return zero results for resolved items
metrics-log.jsonl missing by_source/by_category is intentional design (lightweight time-series), not a bug — read metrics.json for breakdown data

MASTER_DEBT field-stripped static export splits into: debt-summary.json (~2KB), debt-trend.json (~12KB), debt-alerts.json (~432KB S0+open S1), debt-items-s0s1.json (~464KB), debt-items-s2s3.json (~2.2MB lazy)
The '~300KB' MASTER_DEBT export estimate in CHECKPOINT is incorrect — correct is ~464KB initial (S0+S1) + ~2.2MB lazy (S2+S3)
Total static JSON budget across all 6 tabs: ~770-810KB initial load, ~3.5MB full (including lazy debt data) — within 5MB ceiling

pr-ecosystem-audit.jsonl lacks the '-history' suffix used by all 7 other ecosystem audit history files — build script must hard-code this naming inconsistency
Severity breakdown (critical/major/minor/trivial) lives only in per-PR task state files (task-pr-review-NNN-rN.state.json), NOT in reviews.jsonl — requires join across 21 state files to get it
Session-lifecycle produces 40+ state file touchpoints; session-end is the primary data-writing event producing velocity-log, ecosystem-health-log, MASTER_DEBT, metrics.json, reviews.jsonl
16 active hook scripts fire on 6 event types (SessionStart, PreToolUse, PostToolUse, PostToolUseFailure, PreCompact, UserPromptSubmit) with if-conditions gating execution

useTabRefresh hook is hardcoded to AdminTabId — cannot be reused for dev tabs without generalization to useTabRefresh<T extends string>
